testcase.name: venvs.tests.test_common
testcase.error: venvs/tests/test_common.py:5: in <module> from venvs.common import Locator, VirtualEnv venvs/common.py:184: in <module> class _Locator(typer.ParamType): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'typer' has no attribute 'ParamType'
